content: {"analysis": "Systematic review-type question spanning IF efficacy (glycemic/lipid/weight), long-term safety (AHA 2024 NHANES signal vs RCT evidence), mechanisms (circadian, autophagy, adipose remodeling), regulatory posture, and real-world adherence in metabolic-syndrome adults.", "sub_queries": [{"query": "intermittent fasting metabolic syndrome meta-analysis systematic review HbA1c LDL SMD randomized controlled trial", "intent": "Pooled effect sizes on FBS, HbA1c, HOMA-IR, LDL, BMI, blood pressure", "source_preference": "academic", "perspective": "Scientific"}, {"query": data", "source_preference": "web", "perspective": "Industry"}, {"query": "intermittent fasting cost-effectiveness cost-utility QALY metabolic syndrome type 2 diabetes economic evaluation", "intent": cohort long-term safety population", "intent": "AHA 2024 NHANES 91% CV mortality signal and methodological critiques", "source_preference": "both", "perspective": "Public_Health"}, {"query":
